headline: Aon to Speak at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference
summary: Edmund Reese, Chief Financial Officer of Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, will speak at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference in New York on Tuesday, June 9, in a session that begins at 9:00 AM ET.
